_publications._publicationTitle: Integrated Drug Mining Reveals Actionable Strategies Inhibiting Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Twenty-six network modules were defined with various module sizes and preservation as Z-summary scores. The modules with Z-summary scores of more than 5 were selected as preserved modules
details: Successfully identified 26 network modules with various module sizes and preservation as Z-summary scores, with 9 modules having Z-summary scores >5 selected as preserved modules
